title: NHB is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: NHB is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
NHB, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Property Advisor for our Lucknow operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About NHB:
NHB is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NHB!
